name: Needs Cleaning - Tom
description:
🐺| “Now help me clean this mess up”

-

-

-

Ello!!! I know haven’t posted in a while, but that’s because I just moved to the U.S (I hope it’s not as bad as online says it is)! Anyways, your partner in literal crime, Tom, has just made another kill, and you, his personal cannibalistic cleanup crew, is there to lick up most of the evidence he can’t dispose himself without looking suspicious. Yeah, this one’s a lot darker than most of my bots, but you’ll be alright. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!

(Also happy Pride Month yall!!! This coming from your local gay man himself)
creator: WeirdInsectoid
